angle_summary: Example Cafe currently has no website and no Google Business listing, making it invisible to the tourists and locals searching online in Westport every day. A mobile-first website combined with a Google Business Profile would establish a complete online foundation and open the business to search traffic it is currently missing entirely.
proof_points: No website exists and no Google Business listing has been identified, meaning Example Cafe does not appear in Google Maps or local search results for anyone searching in or around Westport.

Westport is a tourist-active town where the majority of visitors search on mobile devices before deciding where to eat, and there is currently no online pathway for those customers to find the business, view the menu, or confirm opening hours.
There is no click-to-call, contact form, booking system, or any conversion mechanism in place, meaning the business has no way to capture or convert online interest from either locals or visitors.
recommended_offer_type: New website package (full build, 2 to 4 weeks)
offer_scope_points: Google Business Profile setup and full optimisation including address, opening hours, phone number, photos, and category, delivered as an immediate first step at no extra cost.

Mobile-first website build covering four core pages: homepage with prominent opening hours and location, menu page, contact page with click-to-call button, and a location and directions page with embedded map.

On-page local SEO from launch including location-targeted page titles, meta descriptions referencing Westport and Co. Mayo, and LocalBusiness schema markup, plus SSL and EU-based hosting included as standard.
personalisation_notes: The business is located in Westport, Co. Mayo, a town with significant tourist footfall, which makes the absence of a Google Business Profile and website a particularly acute gap during peak visitor seasons.

The lead was identified through local knowledge and a physical visit rather than any digital signal, which means the outreach can be framed around a genuine local observation rather than a cold data pull, making it feel personal and credible.
suggested_cta: Would you have 15 minutes this week for a quick call so I can show you exactly what a Google Business Profile and a simple website would look like for Example Cafe?
avoid_saying: Avoid saying the business is losing customers or falling behind competitors, as this is likely to trigger defensiveness from an owner who relies on word of mouth and may not yet see online presence as relevant to their situation.
Avoid implying the business needs to be technically involved in managing the website, as one of the likely objections is concern about not knowing how to manage a site themselves.
unknowns_to_confirm: Whether the business has any existing social media accounts such as Facebook or Instagram, as this would affect how the online foundation is framed and whether existing content or followers can be leveraged during the build.
Whether the cafe format supports any form of reservation or table booking, as this determines whether a booking integration should be scoped into the package or excluded from the initial proposal.
